---
title: "Python Packages 3 : Initial Package"
author: "nshephard"
date: "2022-11-30"
categories: [code, analysis, python, packages, packaging, git, github, gitlab]
image: https://live.staticflickr.com/3873/14573117547_c9d461e52f_k.jpg
---

This is the third post in a series on Python Package that sets up a very basic Python Package that we can test and
document.

# Links
